description.value:
NVIDIA CUDA toolkit for all platforms contains a vulnerability in the cuobjdump binary, where a user could cause an out-of-bounds read by passing a malformed ELF file to cuobjdump. A successful exploit of this vulnerability might lead to a partial denial of service.

Reason for inclusion in AVID: The CVE describes a vulnerability in NVIDIA CUDA toolkit's cuobjdump with local, out-of-bounds read leading to DoS. CUDA tooling is a core software stack used in training, compiling, and deploying AI workloads, so this is a software supply-chain issue affecting AI systems. The vulnerability is security-related and affects a component in the AI software stack; the report provides sufficient details (CVE ID, affected artifact, impact, references).
